title: Kinetically Guided On-Demand mCPBA Generation Enables Safe and Sustainable Light-Driven Synthesis of Davis Reagents
author: Salem, Mohamed S. H.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our system can be defined by five ordinary differential equations (ODEs) to track the changes in five compounds (Aldehyde 2a, Sulfonyl imine 1a, peracdi 4a, carboxylic acid 5a, and Davis reagent 3a)'   concentrations as a function of time under different initial conditions, enabling the calculation of their interfering rates  k a  ,  k b  ,  k c  ,  k d  , and  k e  , values through non-linear regression analysis ( via  Python's Scipy library).
steps_raw: Our system can be defined by five ordinary differential equations (ODEs) to track the changes in five compounds (Aldehyde 2a, Sulfonyl imine 1a, peracdi 4a, carboxylic acid 5a, and Davis reagent 3a)'   concentrations as a function of time under different initial conditions, enabling the calculation of their interfering rates  k a  ,  k b  ,  k c  ,  k d  , and  k e  , values through non-linear regression analysis ( via  Python's Scipy library).
